programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael suffers amnesia and must struggle to recover his identity.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael hits a gypsy boy while going to a Christmas party, unaware the boy is being chased by bank robbers.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael and K.I.T.T. must convince the beautiful and difficult daughter of a famous explorer that she is the target for murder.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: After a Safety Inspector falls to his death off an oilrig, Chief Vick enlists Shawn and Gus’ help. She tells them they received an anonymous tip that something highly unsafe was happening on the rig and the caller was risking his life to warn them.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: Vick calls Shawn and Gus in after a group of fast moving and highly organized thieves pull a smash and grab at a department store. It is the third such hit in a month and the cops have no leads.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: Gus leaves Shawn waiting in the car while he goes inside a bank to make a deposit. He’s only in there a few minutes before a woman spots a gun in the jacket pocket of another customer.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: After Shawn and Gus help a little girl get a mall Santa out of jail in time for Christmas, they realize their clients are con men who have a big score planned.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: When Shabby the Sea Lion is found dead after being released into the wild, Shawn sets out to prove it was murder and stumbles onto a bigger conspiracy.

programme.title: Psych
programme.desc: There’s a thunderstorm in Santa Barbara that has been causing the electricity to flicker on and off, but that doesn’t stop Lassiter from making the bust of his career.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Atonement
programme.desc: Sandoval goes to Renee to request a trial to testify to atrocities against humanity committed by the Taelons. A manhunt for Sandoval begins when he quits and leaves the mother ship. Liam has to protect him on his way to the grand jury.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Strange assaults and several deaths may be related to a Doors/Taelon joint venture where Taelon core energy was used to heal people. It appears that the energy is being sucked back out of the patients.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Hearts and Minds
programme.desc: When Renee's boyfriend appears to her while he is imprisoned on the mother ship, Liam theorizes a special energy bond between the pair. Zo'or is upset by the human's betrayal and bans all humans from the mother ship.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Epiphany
programme.desc: The Taelons announce that they will all go into death stasis and wait on the mother ship for humans to discover how to create core energy and revive them. Zo'or and Da'an don't trust each other to be the last to submit to stasis.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Dark Horizons
programme.desc: Eight Taelons are killed when protectors' implants are re-calibrated with a new imperative to kill instead of protect Taelons. They fear the Jiridians have found a way to control the CVIs. Meanwhile, their core energy continues to deplete.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict: Point of No Return
programme.desc: When Street solves the 8th dimension of Ma'el's riddle, a beacon leads Liam to a chamber with a healing pool. However, there is only enough in the healing pool to help 6 Taelons. Zo'or will do anything to insure his own life.

programme.title: The Lost World: The End Game
programme.desc: The intractable Death comes to settle her score with Lord Roxton. In a series of games, Roxton plays Death in an attempt to keep his life, as well as the lives of his friends.

programme.title: The Lost World: Phantoms
programme.desc: Veronica is led by the sound of piano music into the arms of a lover from a bygone era. Ignoring Challenger's warnings about her involvement with him, she falls quickly for her new beau.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Secret
programme.desc: An assassin threatens the explorers, and Marguerite fears that he may be linked to her past and come to settle old scores. The secret she tries to bury creates a rift between herself and Roxton.

programme.title: The Lost World: Finn
programme.desc: An experiment with new energy sources goes awry, launching Roxton, Challenger, and Marguerite 100 years into the future. They discover that the rest of the world has been ravaged by war.

programme.title: The Lost World: Suspicion
programme.desc: Finn joins the explorers at the Treehouse. A team of archeologists suffer disease, violence, and distrust after opening an ancient urn that may have housed a demonic spirit.

programme.title: The Lost World: The Imposters
programme.desc: The explorers seek out a portal, but are overtaken by a force that replaces Marguerite, Roxton, and Challenger with three demons. With an age of chaos impending, Finn must bring back her friends.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E16 - The Locket
programme.desc: A temporal distortion traps Aeryn and John on a planet's surface, where they live out the rest of their lives.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E17 - The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: Crais and Talyn return. The crew are put on trial for an attack that Talyn made on an alien ship.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E18 - A Clockwork Nebari
programme.desc: A Nebari group comes aboard Moya and attempts to mind cleanse everyone using a drug. Pilot and Rygel are the only two who can resist the effects.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E19 - Liars, Guns And Money, Part 1: A Not So Simple Plan
programme.desc: D'Argo finally gets a lead on his son, Jothee. He will do anything to get him back, but Jothee will be sold as a slave.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E20 - Liars, Guns And Money, Part 2: With Friends Like These
programme.desc: With the loot from the Depository heist at hand, D'Argo anxiously waits to make contact with the Slave Traders.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E21 - Liars, Guns And Money, Part 3: Plan B
programme.desc: The crew is going to break into the depository to free Crichton. Crichton is being tortured for wormhole technology.

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 58
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can a laser alarm be defeated? Can a metal duct be stealthily climbed using magnets? Can a pressure switch be defeated? How easy is it to crack a safe?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 54
programme.desc: Myths tested: Can mind control be achieved? Can a room be painted with dynamite?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 148
programme.desc: Can an object fired backward from a vehicle moving forward simply fall to the ground? Do the spy movie car tricks to escape a chasing car work?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 56
programme.desc: Myths tested: Did Archimedes make a cannon using steam power? Is a cardboard cereal box more nutritious than the sugary cereal inside?

programme.title: MythBusters: Episode 211
programme.desc: Will a crab pot drag you overboard if your foot is caught in a coil? Is it better to work a 30-hour grind with no sleep than with a 20-minute nap every 6 hours?

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women never get their hands dirty: no blood touched them because they manipulate others to kill for them...but they didn't get away.

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: While marriage is meant to be for life, it often ends in divorce. These wives took their marriages vow seriously: "till death do us part."

programme.title: Deadly Women
programme.desc: These women burn madly with jealousy, an anger so deep they’ll kill to satisfy it. What makes them turn from “green with envy” to “lethal with jealousy?" Find out as we explore their hearts of darkness.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Behind their friendly smiles, deadly women hide histories of bloodshed and murder.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hearts of Stone
programme.desc: Deadly Women are not always the ones you expect. They are not the strangers lurking in the dark, they are a young mother, a supportive wife and a grandmother - all killers. Behind their loving masquerade lies a wake of family horror and pain.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Greed
programme.desc: Known as “black widows,” these women kill their spouses, lovers and children for profit. Murder for them becomes a business. Their trade is murder. Their profit? Blood money.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Human Prey
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The C-11 Squad
programme.desc: New York City is not stranger to gang violence. But when a 12-year-old child was kidnapped, the gangs had crossed a line. Law enforcement raced to find the missing boy before it was too late.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A daring kidnapping and a bizarre ransom note baffled Mississippi authorities. The victim was the wife of a wealthy businessman. A list of 12 names and a few drops of blood were the only clues to her fate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Many escape the poverty of India to start new lives in the United States. One turned the American dream into a nightmare. People started turning up dead in New York's Indian community-authorities struggled to link fraud and murder to a powerful man.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Gets The Real Update
programme.desc: Megan wanted to find out if her boyfriend Devin was cheating. But even darker relationship secrets surface! Plus, you'll be shocked to find out why Laura and Steven need Steve's help again!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Do I Have a Child With a Gay Man?
programme.desc: Are Tracy and Latonia's men leading secret double lives with other men? What will the lie detector test results reveal about Kanecha and Mike?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: You Slept With THAT Man?
programme.desc: LaShawna and her boyfriend James will learn if her friend Coral harmed her child years ago. She’ll also admit that she cheated with Coral. How will he react when he finds out another bombshell?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: These DNA Results Will Floor You
programme.desc: Joe met “Jessica” on a phone chat line. A few months later, she revealed she was pregnant. Then, Chastity claims that her ex Trent fathered her child. What will the DNA results reveal?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who Did This?
programme.desc: Who’s responsible for toddler Noel's well-being? Everyone may deny the allegations, but someone knows what happened, and Steve is getting answers!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I’m Not the Man You Think I Am
programme.desc: Sean says his wife has made him so angry that he’s put her in the hospital over 10 times. Sean’s also got a secret of his own — he is really a she! Can Steve help Sean iron out his issues?

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Invisible Death
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Price of Murder
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Proof Of Innocence
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own fingerprint, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The contestants go to a meat locker to learn about cuts of beef. The teams race to impress chef Ramsay when they are asked to put their newfound knowledge to the test.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The 13 remaining chefs compete in two teams to feed 50 hungry kids from a football and cheerleading program. The losing team will have to clean the kitchens and finish prep work for the service challenge.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Ramsay asks the chefs to create three Asian-fusion dishes using poultry, seafood and beef. Both teams crack under pressure when they go head-to-head during the dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams must prepare food for a bar mitzvah. After one contestant is eliminated, the top 10 chefs are revealed.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams try their hands at tapas-style dining using the day's leftovers and one chef's mistake nearly sabotages both teams' performances.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Kimberley Killer
programme.desc: Seven years after the disappearance of baby Azaria Chamberlain at Ayers rock, long before the murder of Peter Falconio on a remote stretch of highway in the Australian outback and two years before Ivan Milat begins his reign of backpacker murders.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Wanda Beach Murders / The Beaumont Children Mystery
programme.desc: In 1965, when Australian teenage culture was centred on sun, sand, and surf, the nation was shocked by the brutal bashing, rape and murder of two 15-year-old girls in the sand hills at Sydney's Wanda Beach.

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Night Caller: Eric Edgar Cooke

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: The Girls Who Knew Too Much

programme.title: Crime Investigation Australia: No More Grannies / The Granny Killer
programme.desc: We delve into the twisted mind of one of Australia's most prolific serial murderers. John Wayne Glover - The Granny Killer, was truly an evil man.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Girl Trouble

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Seeing the Light

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: When a Stranger Calls

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Jack & Jill

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Island Hopper
programme.desc: When a brother bondsman from Washington State calls Dog for help tracking a runner in search of fun in the sun on the tropical paradise of Kauai, the team gets on the case. Dog's only problem? No leads!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Nice Guys Finish Last
programme.desc: Dog and team help out a bondsman friend whose client jumped bail, but the target is a blank slate. Are his tattoos gang related? Is he likely to be violent? And making matters worse, when they hit his apartment they learn he is moving out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Back Behind Bars

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Man

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All in the Family
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives. The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.desc: Nikki and Andell’s parents start dating.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Dead Clown Walking

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Love Potion No. 83

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Somebody’s Watching You

programme.desc: Nikki charms Professor Oglevee’s older brother.

programme.title: NEW The Parkers: Amazing Grace
programme.desc: Nikki meets her guardian angel.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead On Target

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Timothy Peart’s Last Dance

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Dead Weight

programme.desc: Jody, a Lhasa apso, cannot keep her mouth off of anything. From tissues to money, she is the dog who ate your homework and then some. She will eat just about everything in sight.

programme.desc: When Nicole, a young teacher, was found shot to death in a Wisconsin farm field, police arrested her live-in boyfriend who had waited 18 hours to report her missing. But later, a stranger Nicole met at a concert in a local bar became a prime suspect.

programme.desc: Ashamed of a pregnancy out of wedlock and fearful of her parents' reaction, high school senior Skylar Richardson told no one of her condition. But when a newborn’s body was found buried in the family’s backyard, Skylar was charged with murder.

programme.desc: When the body of former policewoman Taylor Wright was discovered buried on a remote Pensacola farm, detectives had a lineup of suspects to investigate, including her ex-husband from whom Taylor stole $100,000, and her new live-in girlfriend Casandra.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.258

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.166

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.250

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.112
programme.desc: Young woman sues foster family over deleted files/Ex-lover sued for loan, truck damage, and impound fees from prison romance.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.126
programme.desc: A loose barter arrangement for rent ends with a woman suing her ex-landlord for allegedly evicting her from his home and failing to return her belongings.

programme.title: Judge Judy: Episode 13.68
programme.desc: A teenager accuses her former live-in fiancé of assault after she allegedly catches him with another woman; she sues him for rent, security deposit, and bills.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: A report about the 2015 showdown between two millionaires, Robert Dahl and Emad Tawfilis, whose bitter money dispute over a Napa Valley winery business ended in murder.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Spies, Lies and Secrets
programme.desc: A report about the death of Shane Todd, a brilliant, high-tech engineer at a Singapore company who, according to his parents, was murdered because he was unwilling to share secrets that could harm the United States.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Elizabeth Welsh's husband, Patrick, left her and their two sons what appeared to be a suicide note and disappeared. After investigating the situation, Elizabeth discovered that Patrick is still alive, living in Texas.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Loved to Death

programme.title: 48 Hours: Tacoma Confidential
programme.desc: A report on corruption and a cover-up by city officials of Tacoma, Washington, focusing on David Brame, the city’s police chief who rose to power despite a shady past.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Ghosts of Mississippi
programme.desc: A report on a string of unsolved homicides in Columbus, Mississippi. Five elderly residents, all living within a mile of each other, were killed within 18 months. Police say, a terrified community believes a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Nothing But Net

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cold Hard Cash
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go North to Alaska and get a cold reception from the local auctioneer. They find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers, including the most powerful production handgun in the world!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Wild West

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ramped Up
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go head-to-head with their former assistant, Carolyn, while Ton battles a bad back. The guys discover an automatic BB gun and, when negotiations to sell a stunt ramp go south, Allen faces a tough decision.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sin City Shootout

programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Into Thin Air

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. Violence

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Girl Next Door

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2016, car salesman Hufracio Arteaga was found stabbed to death in his Michigan City office, and surveillance cameras from a nearby building could potentially help investigators reveal the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In 2015 care worker Torrance Cheeves is found stabbed to death in his Texas home. With no suspects and a trail of puzzling evidence, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in the surrounding area for answers.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: When 12-year-old Alajawan Brown is gunned down outside a 7-Eleven in Skyway, Washington, close to an earlier shooting, the police refer to CCTV footage to help put together pieces of the puzzle and find the killer.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Sylvilla Humphrey shot her friend, Ercell Minix in the neck, at the beauty salon where she worked. The victim's son, 5 at the time, is now NBA star Kendrick Perkins.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Britney Gulley and Jeremisha Adams (both 19 at the time) are responsible for shootings and robberies that left two people dead and a third blind in both eyes.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: In 1986 the body of Patrice LaBlanc surfaces in a Texas Lake. She's been stabbed 39 times by her drag queen boyfriend Cliff Youens. Now he confesses to his crimes.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: An investigation into whether Loyd and Agnes Courtney were beaten and stabbed to death by their daughter Deborah. Prosecutors say it was for money, but Deborah says she didn't do it.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Killing Cousins
programme.desc: On July 26, 1983, police in Vero Beach, Florida received a report of a nude man firing shots at a naked girl on a residential street.

programme.title: Crime Stories: The Homocidal Drifter

programme.desc: On December 11, 1987 a hard luck child living in a group home in Ontario was reported missing when she failed to return home from school.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man in intense pain checks into the hospital, but he deteriorates. Something he's being given in the hospital isn't curing him, it's poisoning him.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police track the killer of two adolescent boys by using profiling, hypnosis and a scientific analysis of the rope used during the crimes.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A new life-insurance policy sparks suspicions of murder when a woman's body is found at the bottom of the basement stairs.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When more than a dozen children contract a mysterious and deadly illness in Seattle, medical investigators frantically search for a cause and cure.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: After the baffling deaths of more than 20 people on an Indian reservation, Navajo medicine men provide a clue that leads to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: A man says he returned to his hotel after a run to find his wife drowned in the bathtub, but a life insurance policy raises investigators' suspicions.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: This edition shows how computer technology and behavioural science combine to create a new forensic tool - geographical profiling which helps police in their pursuit of a rapist.

programme.title: Medical Detectives
programme.desc: When a 22-year-old woman falsely confesses to a series of murders, investigators inspect incriminating fibres that lead to the real killer.

programme.title: Medical Detectives

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: The Way Mork Were
programme.desc: Fred confesses that he's having marital difficulties, so Mork and Mindy relay stories of their troubled times.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Putting the Ork Back In Mork (Part 2)

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Mork In Never-Never Land
programme.desc: With Mindy depressed about not getting a scholarship, it's up to Mork to stir up some laughs, so he brings home a friend who claims to be the real Peter Pan, with the power to fly as just one of his magical talents.

programme.title: Mork & Mindy: Dueling Skates
programme.desc: It's the biggest, funniest roller marathon ever when Mork takes to skates for the first time to race a cheating champion skater down a Rocky Mountain peak into Boulder to save the day care center at which he works from destruction.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: JFK
programme.desc: Richard meets with some prominent JFK assassination researchers to discuss the November 1963 murder of President John F. Kennedy.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Pterodactyls
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several explorers and cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs thought to have become extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: GMO - Genetically Modified Food
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims crop plants created for human or animal consumption using the latest molecular biology techniques are unsafe.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Fluoride
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show investigates the safety and efficacy of putting fluoride in our water supply. Dentists say that putting fluoride in the water supply prevents tooth decay, but some researchers claim it's a toxic substance that causes cancer.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Area 51
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret? The mysterious military base located 30 minutes north west of Las Vegas has been rumored to be involved in back engineering advanced alien technology recovered from UFO crash sites.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: We meet several individuals who claim they have the ability to transcend time and space and identify people, objects, and locations hidden from their view.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Freemasons
programme.desc: Are the Freemasons a harmless fraternity whose members busy themselves by raising money for children's hospitals or a satanic cult whose tentacles and enslave mankind?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Depopulation Agenda
programme.desc: Richard interviews an investigative health reporter and a NY Times best-selling author about their claims that a powerful cabal is waging war on mankind through forced sterilization, vaccination and other means.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Mokele Mbembe
programme.desc: Mokele Mbembe means able to stem the flow of rivers. The Pygmies there say they have encountered just such a creature and according to their descriptions, this behemoth is a dead ringer for an Apotosaurus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Bigfoot
programme.desc: Two prominent Bigfoot trackers and a cryptozoologist affirm the existence of this shy and elusive creature and relate several close encounters with Sasquatch.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence
programme.desc: From a famous artist who vanished to a traitorous Nazi who saved the day, discover the secrets inside the Uffizi Gallery.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the State Historical Museum, Moscow
programme.desc: From the duel that killed a genius to Lenin’s Rolls-Royce, discover the secrets inside the State Historical Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Chateau of Versailles, Paris
programme.desc: From the schemes of Marie Antoinette to the spectrum of a star that reveals the origin of human life, discover the secrets inside the Chateau of Versailles.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Wild Weather Season
programme.desc: 2005 seemed to be the year that Earth went wild. Follow George as he brings us back to the site of his hairiest adventures from that year.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Volcanic Wedding
programme.desc: Most people's idea of a dream wedding might include a horse drawn carriage and an elaborate ceremony. Not George. Join him as he and his bride to be tie the knot in an unusual and certainly exotic way.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Polynesian Volcanoes
programme.desc: In New Zealand, George learns that an undersea volcano 1000 miles North in Tonga is creating a new island. After nautical mishaps, clad in nothing but underwear and a life jacket, George becomes one of the first explorers on this new land.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: From "Fin Del Mundo," George sails on a Russian icebreaker to Antarctica. After braving stormy Drake passage, he explores volcanic Deception Island, camps in Antarctic snow and paddles a kayak through icebergs calved off melting glaciers.

programme.title: Angry Planet: West Coast Winter Weather
programme.desc: On Canada's rugged West Coast, George ice-climbs a frozen waterfall, uses ski-skins to climb Mt.Garibaldi to an alpine lake, visits a storm-watching lodge on British Columbia's Long Beach, home of winter surfing and massive Pacific storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Elephant Cave
programme.desc: Waterfall-shrouded Kitum Cave has been carved out by elephants in search of salt on Mount Elgon at the Kenya-Uganda border. George gets bitten by one of the cave bats suspected of carrying the deadly Marburg virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Empty Quarter
programme.desc: The Empty Quarter is a windswept area of sand dunes. In a tiny corner of this vast desert lies Dubai, a glitzy ultra-modern playground. George heads out from Abu Dhabi on a 4W safari to see both sides of this corner of Arabia.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Indonesia
programme.desc: In Indonesia George visits massive Komodo Dragons, explores steaming sulfur vents of Papandayan, visits villagers whose town got swept away by Sidoarjo Mudflow, and tackles his toughest climb to date - the very active Semeru Volcano.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Fire And Water
programme.desc: It's the intense summer wildfires that often plague the area during their 24 hours of daylight. He travels by train, bike, plane and whitewater raft to reach the fires but Mother Nature has other plans for him and doesn't make things easy.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hottest and Coldest
programme.desc: George meets ultra-marathon runners in searing heat of Death Valley and bone-chilling cold of the Yukon. He dog-sleds in snow and meets wild characters like Caveman Bill, who has lived alone in a cave through 12 long cold Yukon winters.

programme.title: How to Colonize the Stars
programme.desc: Leading physicists and engineers in the field of interstellar travel discuss some of the deep issues we face when considering the problem of sending spacecraft to other stars. Will mankind ever truly become a space fairing civilization?

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Ever Expanding Universe
programme.desc: The Ever-Expanding Universe investigates a battery of high-tech telescopes that are joining the Hubble Space Telescope on its quest to unlock the secrets of our universe, a cosmos almost incomprehensible in its size, age and violence.

programme.title: Hunting the Edge of Space: The Mystery of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The Mystery of the Milky Way chronicles the history of telescopes, from Galileo's refractor to Newton's reflector and beyond. This episode also looks at recent missions, including the Herschel Space Observatory's examination of the Milky Wa

programme.title: In the Shadow of the Moon
programme.desc: Between 1968 and 1972, the world watched in awe each time an American spacecraft voyaged to the Moon. Only 12 men walked upon its surface and they remain the only human beings to have stood on another world.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A French interpreter urgently needs the detective, as criminals try to take him to their hide out.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Faces Death

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Visiting a home of high nobility, a businessman is murdered.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: The Case of the Exhumed Client

programme.title: The Spider Woman

programme.title: The Adventures Of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Holmes investigates a missing boy that vanishes on a train after he and his father have a fight.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina: Thailand – The Wild Heart
programme.desc: Thailand is a land of extremes. A country shaped by wild forces, where animals face tough challenges to survive. Yet they have evolved into some of the most iconic and successful species on the planet.

programme.title: Wildest Islands: Zanzibar: Land of Giants
programme.desc: The Zanzibar Archipelago has been labeled the most exotic island chain in the world. Pristine sands and azure blue sea make it a much loved holiday destination. /The Caribbean is a tropical paradise. Each of the 7,000 islands are unique.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Nice Guys Finish Last
programme.desc: Dog and team help out a bondsman friend whose client jumped bail, but the target is a blank slate. Are his tattoos gang related? Is he likely to be violent? And making matters worse, when they hit his apartment they learn he is moving out.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Back Behind Bars
programme.desc: While tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five year stretch in the big house, Leland struggles to find time to train and compete for his first boxing match in years.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Family Man
programme.desc: Dog and family head to Kona to track down a wanted father who's looking to bolt to the mainland to evade sentencing. Meanwhile, Dog does some evading of his own - Avoiding the much dreaded birthday party!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: All in the Family
programme.desc: Dog and the team need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives. The case is a family affair with both mother and daughter in trouble with the law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Mother Courage
programme.desc: Dog knows that crime and drugs not only damage victims but also harm the families of the perpetrators, especially the kids. And both of the fugitives he's chasing today have left shattered families and struggling women in their wake.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Bounty Boot Camp
programme.desc: Jim is a bondsman and longtime friend of Dog. Jim's son has just started in the family business. Today, Jim has asked Dog to track down a potentially dangerous fugitive, and take his son along for some training with the best in the world.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Friends and Neighbors
programme.desc: Dog and his posse head to Colorado for a special mission, to catch Marco, an alleged drug dealer. It's been ten months since Marco went on the lam, and his bondsman stands to lose his family business if Marco is not caught.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Coop! There It Is!
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project - renovating the chicken coop.

programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Master and Duck Commander
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Inlawful Entry
programme.desc: When Missy's parents visit, her father convinces Jase to take him on a quail hunt. But while their "bonding hunt" yields very few quail, it does bring them closer together as friends. Meanwhile, Willie helps John Luke start his own snow cone business.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Flock and Key
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box. Meanwhile, Jase helps Mia prepare for her cheerleading competition, but the only problem is he has no idea.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ball in the Family
programme.desc: When Willie's old rival Phillip McMillan challenges him to a game of dodgeball, Willie recruits his family members to settle a score once and for all. Meanwhile, Si thinks his cat is cheating on him with another family, so he recruits Miss Kay.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drone Survivor
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view, but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Alan in Charge
programme.desc: Jase and the guys convince Willie to hire his older brother Alan to work at Duck Commander, but when Alan begins micromanaging everyone, they quickly change their mind. Meanwhile, the ladies take a self-defense class and use John Luke as a punching bag.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Renaissance Men
programme.desc: When the Robertsons throw a Renaissance Fair birthday party for Godwin, various family members compete in a tournament to win knighthood.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Heroes Welcome
programme.desc: In this special episode, the Duck Commander team surprises two wounded veterans with a trip to Monroe so they can be in an episode of Duck Dynasty. To show their support, the Robertson family stages a color run to bring awareness to our wounded soldiers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Pie Hard
programme.desc: Willie and Alan agree to help Miss Kay open her own bakery, but things take a turn when Kay is asked to hand over her secret recipes. Meanwhile, the guys in the duck call room take an extended lunch break by driving to Mississippi.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Merry Christmas from Grandpa
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Jonathan shows three men what will happen in the future if the Earth continues to be ravaged by pollution. One of the men is an energy official another is a farmer and the third one is the President.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Pilot - Part 1
programme.desc: In the series opener, we meet Jonathan Smith, a probationary angel who has been sent to help people on Earth. He befriends residents at a retirement home. The administrator at the home has a brother named Mark who is suspicious of Jonathan.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Pilot - Part 2
programme.desc: Jonathan helps the residents of Havencrest, when they learn that the retirement home is going to be sold. Jonathan must reveal his real identity to Mark in order to complete the assignment.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: To Touch The Moon
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven: Return of the Masked Rider
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Mount Shasta National Forest
programme.desc: Mount Shasta National Forest: From inexplicable disappearances to mysterious experiments, events in Mount Shasta National Park may be explained by an ancient Karuk Indian legend.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: El Yunque National Forest
programme.desc: El Yunque National Forest: Few know that one of the US's most mysterious National Parks is in Puerto Rico - a place some believe is home to a creature known as the Chucabara.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Gettysburg National Military Park
programme.desc: Gettysburg National Military Park: Many believe Gettysburg National Military Park is haunted by its violent past - here, explore some incredible claims about the park's history.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Big Bend National Park
programme.desc: Big Bend National Park: A series of incidents in Big Bend National Park leave experts convinced of secret alien activities taking place there.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Death Valley National Park
programme.desc: Death Valley National Park: Discover the forces living in the secret underworld of Death Valley National Park, where a series of deaths and disappearances have taken place.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Cleveland National Forest
programme.desc: Cleveland National Forest: Explore Cleveland National Forest, where reports of gun-wielding ghosts, savage creatures and otherworldly portals are rife.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Apache Sitgreaves National Forests
programme.desc: Apache-Sitgreaves National Forest: A trip through the ginormous forest in Arizona. Strange encounters rumoured to have happened there include an alien abduction.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Great Smokey Mountains National Park
programme.desc: Great Smokey Mountains National Park: A stroll through a national park that is the alleged underground base for a powerful secret society.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Mark Twain National Forest
programme.desc: Mark Twain National Forest: Some claim that the dark, mysterious energies that surround this national park point to treasures from a lost civilisation that are hidden there.

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Chaco Culture National Historical Park
programme.desc: Was Chaco Canyon a complex ceremonial center with extraordinary astronomical alignments of buildings and roads?

programme.title: National Park Mysteries: Yosemite National Park
programme.desc: One of America’s most beloved wilderness areas, Yosemite National Park, has a dark side – ghost and UFO sightings, mysterious disappearances and a pre-historic Pterodactyl - which experts believe is caused by a rift in the fabric of time.

programme.title: Dynasty: Mark
programme.desc: Blake tries to be friends with Adam, but Adam rejects him. Alexis tells Mark that he's still married to Krystle. Mark seeks to get a job as a tennis pro at Fallon's hotel.

programme.title: Dynasty: Kirby
programme.desc: Joseph's daughter, Kirby comes to stay with the Carringtons after breaking up with her fiance in France. Joseph tries to persuade her to go back to him. Mark gets the job at Fallon's hotel. Blake tries to get help from congressman Neal McVane.

programme.title: Dynasty: La Mirage
programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty: Acapulco
programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Locket
programme.desc: The Carrington family is informed that Steven's oil rig exploded. Blake goes to look for him, with an uninvited Alexis. Sammy Jo's father returns to Denver to collect Sammy Jo's share of Steven's inheritance, but Krystle throws him out.

programme.title: Battlefront: WWII Road To Victory: U-Boat War
programme.desc: U-boats posed the deadliest threat to Allied convoys traveling the Atlantic.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: By the end of the war the RAF had aircraft that could escort bombers to targets deep inside Germany and back. With the Gloster Meteor, the RAF had also entered the ‘Jet Age’. Aircraft like the Hawker Hunter and F-86 Sabre took the RAF supersonic.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: By the end of the First World War the RAF had bombers that could fly to Berlin and back. For the first time in a thousand years British civilians found themselves under direct attack - by Zeppelin airships and Gotha bombers.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The RAF’s maritime role is often overlooked. Between the wars the RAF operated elegant flying boats to patrol the far flung corners of the Empire.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: After the war, RAF transports helped keep Berliners alive during the Soviet blockade of the city in 1948/49. As well as flying round-the-clock operations into the airport, Sunderland flying boats delivered supplies by landing on Lake Havel near the city.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Solana & Elijah
programme.desc: Solana is in a relationship with Danny but can't stop thinking about her online love Elijah. His photos were used in so many profiles that she has to know is this the real Elijah?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miranda & Cameryn
programme.desc: After years of online chats Miranda discovered that Cameryn was not the man he claimed to be. She confronted him only to be given another suspicious profile. Is he someone else entirely?

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jeff & Megan
programme.desc: After a string of bad luck with women, Jeff believes he has finally found his dream girl Megan. However, Megan is starting to sound off Catfish alarms.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Bianca & Brogan
programme.desc: When Brogan disappears from the Internet, then returns online after a year without question, Bianca wants to know what happened in the missing year.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Miracle & Javonni
programme.desc: Smart, single mum Miracle fell for Javonni, a dreamy-eyed Instagrammer. With Max on hiatus, Nev teams up with TV personality Charlamagne to take Miracle on a hunt for the man of her dreams. (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Courtney & Isaak
programme.desc: Courtney broke up with Isaak, who she met online. He's doing everything to get her back. Beauty queen Cassidy Wolf joins Nev to get Isaak to leave Courtney alone for good. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: The Hills: Who To Choose? / You'll Never Have This
programme.desc: Audrina reconnects with an old flame, Cory, and finds herself juggling two guys. Spencer forces Heidi to kick her sister out of the apartment. (S4, ep10)

programme.title: The Hills: I Want You To Be With Me / It's Her Move
programme.desc: Lauren tries to make peace between Brody and Stephanie. Audrina wants to make things work with Corey, but Justin won't give up on her. (S4, ep12)

programme.title: The City: If She Can Make It Here...
programme.desc: Whitney arrives in New York City during fashion week just in time to start her new career with iconic designer, Diane Von Furstenberg. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: The City: The Truth Will Reveal Itself
programme.desc: Whitney's world is turned upside-down when a boy from her past shows up to warn her that Jay has been fooling around. Olivia decides that befriending Whitney is her new project. (S1, ep2)

programme.title: The City: The L Word
programme.desc: Whitney gets mixed signals from Jay and decides to ask him directly where she stands. Erin's new boyfriend comes to visit and Whitney realizes it's time to find her own apartment. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: The City: Good Things Come In Threes
programme.desc: Whitney dates a new guy and Jay confesses to Adam his true feelings about Whitney. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: The City: Boys Night Out
programme.desc: Adam lets loose while his girlfriend Allie is out of town, but when she hears he kissed another girl from Whitney and the others, Adam finds himself in hot water. (S1, ep5)

programme.title: The City: He Never Said He Had a Girlfriend
programme.desc: Allie breaks down after a run in with the girl who claims she kissed Adam, but Adam sticks to his story to win Allie back, and Whitney gets upset with Jay for taking Adam's side. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: The City: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: Kelly Cutrone accuses Allie of being too skinny, and Whitney finds herself caught in the middle. Erin runs into an ex-boyfriend and old feelings begin to return. (S1, ep7)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Doomsday
programme.desc: When an unscrupulous manufacturer risks World War III by offering a hydrogen bomb for sale, the Impossible Missions Force enters the bidding with a dangerous plan to keep the weapon out of enemy hands.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bunker, Pt. 1
programme.desc: The IMF races a paid killer who is stalking a nuclear scientist forced by the enemy to work on a device that could upset the world power balance in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bunker, Pt. 2
programme.desc: While trying to free a nuclear scientist and his wife from enemy hands, the IMF is trapped when a would-be assassin takes over one of Rollin's disguises in Part 2.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Nitro
programme.desc: The IMF finds itself only a second away from eternity when they intercept a nitroglycerine expert who plans to blow up the government house of a small country, thus provoking war with its neighbor nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Vault
programme.desc: Guest star Nehemiah Persoff as a corrupt Latin American official plots to loot his own country of $40,000,000 with the connivance of the IMF.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Chelsea's dad tries to cut Adam out of her life, Jenelle is arrested for breaking and entering, Kailyn signs a joint custody agreement and Leah and Corey tie the knot. Last in the series.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Finale Special: Check Up With Dr. Drew
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts the cast of Teen Mom 2 on-stage in front of a live studio audience. Jenelle, Chelsea, Kailyn and Leah reflect on the struggles of their first year of motherhood.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Season 1 Unseen Moment
programme.desc: Dr Drew hosts a look at the humour and the heartbreaking moments never before seen with Kailyn, Leah, Jenelle and Chelsea from the first season of Teen Mom 2.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: Jenelle is back with Kieffer after bailing him out of jail, but everything hits the fan when Barbara finds out that she's been lying about Kieffer and kicks her out.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Curveball
programme.desc: Leah's upset when Ali needs another MRI. Jenelle and Kieffer are living in her car but begin to fight. Chelsea decides to give Adam another shot.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Germany launched Operation Barbarossa, a savage and merciless attack on the Soviet Union. Now, newly colorised film and amateur home movies provide an unprecedented inside look at this brutal conflict.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: 1942. Nazi Germany's Blitzkrieg enters Egypt. Field Marshal Erwin Rommel, aka the Desert Fox, has his eyes set on Cairo, but first he must overcome General Bernard Montgomery, the British Eighth Army, and the area's punishing fighting conditions.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: July 1943. For six months, the German advance has stalled, but Hitler is convinced that his new generation of Nazi tanks will help put the Reich back on the path to European domination. His target: the Soviet town of Kursk.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: Stunning, newly colorised combat and newsreel footage plus personal memoirs take us to the heart of a battle that would be a catastrophic blow to both sides and leave a muddy graveyard across East Belgium.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: Rare newsreel and amateur footage, newly colorised, take us inside Hitler's crumbling empire and onto the front lines of the firefight for the streets of Berlin, a battle that will determine the fate of World War II.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: All Hands On Deck
programme.desc: With only four weeks left in the Atlantic Bluefin season, two boats have the challenge of novice fishermen on board – and it could make or break their season.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Uncharted Territory
programme.desc: The Atlantic Bluefin are starting to migrate out of New England waters, so the Gloucester fleet races to find any edge they can, but will their risky new strategies pay off?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Twice Bitten
programme.desc: With only two weeks left on the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, just one fish is not enough for the Gloucester captains – and the lure of doubling their luck is overpowering.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Money On The Line
programme.desc: In the first episode of a two-part season finale, Gloucester's reigning Bluefin champion Dave Carraro, of FV-tuna.com, starts the fishing season with a $20,000 lead over his rival.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Endgame
programme.desc: With only three days left in the North Atlantic Bluefin Tuna season, the captains of Gloucester race against each other - and an oncoming storm - in the battle to land their final fish of the season.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Rocky Mountain Front
programme.desc: This week, game wardens are kept busy during hunting season as they're out catching poachers with an elk decoy, tracking down trespassers, and checking tags.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Check Point
programme.desc: When your job is protecting our most precious natural resources in some of the nation's most remote areas, there is rarely a dull moment. Wardens chronicles the lives of Conservation Officers in America.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Crow Creek
programme.desc: This week, Montana game wardens saddle up for a back country patrol in search of poachers while other wardens are busy with other illegal hunters and anglers, not to mention an elderly man who is feeding deer he shouldn't be.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Whitefish
programme.desc: This week, wardens come across a gruesome crime involving deer poachers as well as some illegal fishing activity. They also say goodbye to one of their own, as Captain Jeff Darrah retires from duty after 26 years on the job.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation White Sulpher
programme.desc: This week, wardens deal with conflicting hunting stories which leads one man into trouble. Meanwhile, other wardens deal with would-be trespassers as the hunting season comes to a close.

programme.title: Wardens: Operation Recap
programme.desc: This week, we sit down with Bryan Golie, Jeff Darrah, Joe Kambic, and John Lasofsky as they recount what they've been through in their careers as well as what happened this past season.

programme.title: Alien Mass Sightings: The Undeniable Truth
programme.desc: Documentary analyzes mass alien sightings, questions reliability of official explanations, identifies common patterns for further investigation.

programme.title: The Hills' Abduction : The Zeta Reticuli Incident
programme.desc: Barney & Betty Hill's abduction and the Zeta reticuli incident explored.

programme.title: Aliens and Pyramids
programme.desc: Many pyramidal structures around the world exhibit strange glyphs of futuristic objects and signs of advanced machining with laser perfection. Was there help from an extraterrestrial source?

programme.title: Abducted by Aliens: UFO Encounters of the 4th Kind
programme.desc: Are we being taken by beings from outer space or another dimension? A troubling phenomenon has been occurring for centuries.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 2
programme.desc: The Tattoo Fixers on Holiday are back in the sunny Med, and this week Glen licks Gabriela's tat into shape, Sketch covers Eileen's saucy self-portrait and Alice gives Aimee a confidence boosting original.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 1
programme.desc: Tattoo Fixers on Holidays is back and this week new arrival Glen banishes bad boy Ashley's Magaluf moto, Sketch helps Bobby get rid of his rank rabbit, Alice gives Rachel a sentimental design, and Jay strips Clair of an awful ex tat.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 3
programme.desc: The Fixers are putting bad tatts to bed in the sunny Med. Jay is taking on Tom the Titty Whacker, Alice helps out Catherine a Cher impersonator with a awful orchid and Sketch destroys a Alex's bad boxing tat.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 6
programme.desc: Sketch hides a Kardashian catastrophe, Alice gives Lana's emoji a facelift, and Jay is moved by a family's story of bravery.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers On Holiday: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Tattoo Fixers are back, and this time they've headed to the scene of the crime to cover awful art...the summer holiday! Ian needs help to cover his Magaluf monstrosity and Jay gives Callum a portrait to remember.

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron takes up golf with hilarious results. Sophie makes a life changing purchase. Holly has a fitness photo shoot and Marnie & Casey have their first date since Rox's birth. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly prepares to meet one of her trolls. Gary and Emma's second baby arrives early. Sophie shows off her new house and Marnie & Casey fall out at the pool. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron welcomes his son into the world, but there's some bad news for his relationship. Holly takes a trip to secure a wedding venue and Marnie sees her mum for the first time since lockdown. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: After leaving Geordie Shore; Aaron, Marnie and Holly continue their journey through adult life. No more shots & kebabs, it's all about wedding planning, changing nappies and being grown ups. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: A hospital visit thaws tensions between Aaron and Talia. Holly goes shopping for bridesmaid dresses and Casey hatches a plan behind Marnie's back. (S3, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron meets Talia to try and save their relationship. Holly goes on the hunt for her wedding dress and Casey is nearly ready to pop the question... there's just one thing missing. (S3, ep4)

programme.desc: Romance and intrigue combine with the mystery of a famous international jewel as The Love Boat sails amid the scenic beauty of the Aegean Sea - including the glorious sights of the Greek Islands and Turkey.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Venetian Love Song - Part 1
programme.desc: While the Pacific Princess sails through the beautiful waters of Italy, a seemingly happy couple (Shelly Winters and Ernest Borgnine) reveals that their relationship is far from perfect.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Venetian Love Song - Part 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: Same Wavelength/ Winning Isn't Everything/ A Honeymoon For Horace
programme.desc: A mindreader meets a man and uses the reading to improve her chances at getting his attention. Meanwhile, Capt. Stubing's friend brags about his son's accomplishments, but Vicki hears a totally different story.

programme.title: The Love Boat: Too Many Dads/ Love Will Find A Way/ The Best Of Friends
programme.desc: A 10-year-old boy is torn between his biological father, who he hasn't seen since he was a baby, and the stepfather who raised him. Meanwhile, Elaine tries to tell her parents that her fiance is a paraplegic.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Yogi's reputation hangs by a thread after the biggest week of his entire career.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Russell faces a nightmare in the outback when a track collapses under his rig.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Veteran Dennis Dent faces a life-long nemesis. Christian takes on the wild back country.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Turbo struggles through a marathon trek to get back home.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Forming up a mega road train in torrid weather; one truck hits the limit.

programme.title: Outback Truckers

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Chicken Pox/Sick As A Dog

programme.title: Arthur: Silent Treatment/Kung Fool

programme.title: Arthur: Buster Isn't Buying It/One Ornery Critter
programme.desc: Aliens, conspiracy theories, the megatoad--Buster believes in everything, until his favorite show gets cancelled for false reporting. Dogs love Arthur! Well, except Carrot Cake. Can Arthur win over this picky pup?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Makes Waves/It Came From Beyond
programme.desc: With the community pool closed for repairs and the temperature on the rise, Arthur and D.W. need a place to keep cool. Then, Grandma Thora takes in a stray: an adorable little dog named...Killer?

programme.title: Arthur: To Tibble the Truth/Waiting to Go
programme.desc: When the Tibble Twins' constant lying lands them in constant trouble, they promise to tell only the truth. Binky and Brain collide on the soccer field, breaking Brain's new watch and nearly breaking their friendship.

programme.title: Arthur: Fifteen
programme.desc: How much can Arthur and his friends do in 15 minutes? Can they all accomplish these missions impossible before the clock counts all the way down? Only time will tell!

programme.title: Arthur: Flea to Be You and Me/Kiss and Tell
programme.desc: Pal is itching like crazy and the culprit is Pepe, an Italian circus flea. Then, Emily returns from her summer in Paris with the amazing news that she's been kissed .... by a boy! Now can D.W. find her own Prince Charming?

programme.title: Arthur: Follow the Bouncing Ball/Buster Baxter and the Letter from the Sea
programme.desc: Alberto Molina's beloved soccer ball--signed by his favorite Ecuadorian soccer star --is lost! While on vacation, Buster discovers a message in a bottle on the shore. Could it be a message from the people of the lost city of Atlantis?

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: You Can Count on Me
programme.desc: Barney helps his friends discover just how fun numbers can be by taking them on a number hunt in the park. Baby Bop delights in sharing her favorite number and the kids discover that numbers can be found everywhere.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All Aboard
programme.desc: Kami, one of Barney's youngest friends, has trouble keeping up with the other kids and she's tired of always being last. She's not having a very good day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Best In Show - Ducks And Fish
programme.desc: When the kids decide to have a Dog Show to show off their pets, BJ feels a little left out. He doesn't have a dog, and he sure wishes he did! A friend from the park shares her dog with BJ so he can join in the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Picture of Friendship
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Making a Move
programme.desc: Welcome to the neighborhood! Anna has just moved to the neighborhood and is missing her old friends. Barney and his friends help her discover that moving is an adventure with new places to explore and new friends to meet.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: I'm A Builder
programme.desc: When Baby Bop wonders about the noises she hears, Barney explains that the sounds are from big trucks and machines at a nearby construction site. This inspires BJ to build something himself—a wind-up toy robot.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Invasion

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Retreat
programme.desc: The Minicons rescue the kids from the military, while Sideways learns the location of the Autobots' Earth base and leads every Decepticon to Coby's home town...

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Revelation
programme.desc: Scourge frees Megatron from Starscream's trap and heads toward Earth. The Autobots must deal with Megatron and locating Starscream's location at the same time.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Critical
programme.desc: Just as all hope is lost, the light of Primus shines down on the fallen Autobot warriors (Scattershot, Red Alert, and Hot Shot) and resurrects them.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Assault
programme.desc: A three-way battle unfolds between the Decepticons, the Autobots, and Starscream's forces. Then, an Autobot warrior named Wing Saber appears.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Starscream
programme.desc: With the Autobots closing in, Starscream unleashes the Omega Lock's power and grows to a tremendous size.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: United
programme.desc: Override, Evac, and Leobreaker are sent to help the Cybertron Defense team on Cybertron. Megatron's Decepticons follow as well as Thunderblast who joins Megatron. Optimus and Wing Saber combine and overpower Starscream.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Cybertron
programme.desc: The Autobots are finally able to destroy Megatron. They then try to revive Cybertron using the Omega Lock, but it triggers a reaction that seemingly begins to tear apart the planet!

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Balance
programme.desc: The true form of planet Cybertron is revealed as the planet sized transformer, Primus. Jolt is used as the device to connect and relay the messages of Primus, who begins to speak of things that have long since passed.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Darkness
programme.desc: The Autobots search for Jolt and the kids who have been kidnapped by Sideways and Starscream, but Megatron has discovered new information regarding Unicron's dark power that could alter the effects of the war.

programme.title: Transformers: Cybertron: Memory
programme.desc: The kids are forced to use trickery to keep Sideways and Starscream from deleting Jolt's memory, but the Autobots are getting closer with every minute.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sandra & Kyle
programme.desc: Sandra and Kyle have been renting her late grandma’s shabby, outdated house and it’s time for something more modern. The Property Brothers come to the rescue helping them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Mark & Priscilla
programme.desc: With a second child on the way, Mark and Priscilla are desperate to escape their cramped rental. The Property Brothers come to the rescue helping them find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated on time.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Christine and Mathieu
programme.desc: Christine, Mathieu and their two active kids are living in a cramped rental and urgently need to escape. The Property Brothers come to the rescue helping them find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kathryn and Eric
programme.desc: Expectant parents Kathryn and Eric are ready to trade in his downtown bachelor pad for a family-friendly house in the suburbs. They want a big bright kitchen, formal dining space, cozy living room and a beautiful nursery

programme.title: Property Brothers: Danielle and Chad
programme.desc: Danielle and Chad, and their three rambunctious kids, are sharing a tiny bedroom in his mom’s house. They want a private, detached home with four bedrooms, spacious kitchen, playroom, plus a backyard

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of the Fly
programme.desc: Intent on revenge against both the Turtles, Krang and Shredder, the Fly (alias Baxter Stockman) returns with a bug of a plan. While the Turtles are battling Shredder, the insect tries to exterminate the entire group!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mutagen Monster
programme.desc: The chemicals from two carriages in a train wreck unite to form a mutagen, and steers licking up the goo are transformed into a bull-headed monster.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Corporate Raiders From Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder utilizes a hypnotizing device and creates zombies out of CEOs all over the city. Ultimately, the plan is to raise the Technodrome from the centre of the Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Pizza By The Shred
programme.desc: In order to locate the Turtles' lair and destroy them, Shredder opens a pizza parlour. When the Turtles order a pizza, Shredder places a locator-tracking device on it disguised as an anchovy.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Super Bebop & Mighty Rocksteady
programme.desc: Krang creates Cybernetic Clones of Rocksteady, only ten times as strong and ten times as smart.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Blast From the Past
programme.desc: Shredder endeavours to enlist the aid of the ghost of Shibano-Sama, a noble warrior who lived hundreds of years ago, to destroy the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Leatherhead: Terror of the Swamp
programme.desc: The Turtles go south to the swamps when their friends the Frogs -and Napoleon Bonafrog - are in trouble. The source of their predicament is Leatherhead, a half-human, half-alligator mutation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Michelangelo's Birthday
programme.desc: It's Michelangelo's birthday - and his good buddies are pretending they're unaware of it.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Usagi Yojimbo
programme.desc: Shredder's Teleporter, which can teletransport objects to a pre­determined location, interferes with Donatello's transdimensional reception - and Usagi Yojimbo, a 14th century Samurai rabbit, pops out of the Turtles' screen.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Case of the Hot Kimono
programme.desc: Agatha Marble helps the Turtles in their pursuit of Don Turtelli, including Splinter's treasured red robe - and holding Happy Hour News' April and Vernon prisoners.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Laa-Laa comes out of the house does a little dance and calls the other Teletubbies for a Big Hug. They stop to watch 2 little girls making a pretend friend, out of old clothes.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy fetches the others to watch Andy Brown and some children looking at Peacocks. The magical tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies sit down to eat some Tubby Custard, but they stop to watch some children buy some different sorts of vegetables. The Teletubbies ask the question – what colour is Tubby Custard?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and teaches Laa-Laa to count to six. The Teletubbies watch some children sing and act out the nursery rhyme ‘Sing a Song of Sixpence’.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children taking photographs of each other's faces. Dipsy has a good look around Teletubbyland when a telescope appears.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are having their Tubby Toast when a voice trumpet brings them a message. The Teletubbies watch Alex Pascall and some children go looking for birds in the park.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po’s present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children mixing water, paint and washing up liquid to make bubble pictures. Po shows us how to make Tubby Custard before running off to watch three ships sail through Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: It’s time for Tubby Toast. Dipsy and Laa-Laa are so excited, they bounce up and down on their seats so much they fall off. They sit up to watch some children watching some birds in a bird bath.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises and play some music and the Teletubbies dance. A little girl shows us her piano and the sound the keys make. Another voice trumpet makes a big roaring noise.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It’s a blistering hot day on Sunflower Valley. Bob and Wendy have got to finish building their workshop – making the workbenches and installing the power tools – it’s an inside job so the machines all get the day off.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob, Scoop and Skip are helping Mr Beasley to install a new Rockery when Mr Bentley appears to ask for Bob’s help. The Mayor wants to stage an art exhibition, but there are no available venues. Scoop suggests renovating the inside of the Old Mill.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Mr. Beasley decides to grow pineapples, and the best way top do this is to build a pineapple pit – a special pit, heated by horse manure! Travis wants to help and decides to fetch some horse manure from Farmer Pickles farm in Bobsville as quick as he can.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: A fierce storm is forecast for Bobsville. At the farm Travis stays safe and snug in his shed, while Spud takes cover in a large barn. The storm causes a lot of damage and a tree falls on Spud’s barn – he’s okay, but his nose is a bit squashed!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob and the gang have been asked to replace some burst pipes under the main road. Meanwhile Jenny is in town to persuade Wendy to take a much-needed holiday. Unfortunately, there’s lots of work to do and Wendy simply doesn’t have time to go away.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a plan to accommodate all of the newcomers. He’s designed a kit house that clips together quickly and easily. Bob’s dad Robert comes to the valley to help build the houses, while Mr and Mrs Bentley conduct a survey on the newcomers’ requirements.

programme.title: The Big Dino Dig
programme.desc: In this new episodic special Bob and the team tackle a big new job – building a dinosaur-themed fun park. With the help of park manager Tony Toberomi and new dumper truck Rubble, the team constructs a roller coaster, slide, train ride and flying ride.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Roley is desperate to help with the apple harvest, but there’s not much a road roller can do to help. Farmer Pickles, meanwhile, asks Bob to build him a new press to make apple juice. Roley tries to help Spud collect a load of apples

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are building Sunflower Valley’s first geodesic dome. As Wendy has organised the dome and knows how it all fits together, Bob suggests that she might like to take charge of the job. Reluctantly Wendy agrees.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Scoop and the machines are in Sunflower Valley setting up Wendy’s caravan. Scoop contacts Muck to find out where Bob has got to. Muck explains that they haven’t left Bobsville yet because they’ve lost Bob’s Dad!

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: The team are taking a break from building so they can tidy-up all the left over materials from around the Valley. Farmer Pickles asks Bob if he’ll put together Scruffty’s new kennel. Bob’s got a busy morning but agrees to build the kennel later on.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Farmer Pickles has a new family of Pigs being delivered to his farm and Bob must build a new home for them. In the meantime, Farmer Pickles places the pigs in an old Barn to keep them safe.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has been making secret early morning trips to the school where Mrs Percival has been giving him salsa lessons, as he wants to impress everybody at the town dance that night.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: It is Wendy’s birthday, but she insists she doesn’t want any fuss – such as a surprise party. She heads off to start the day’s work, laying a Heritage Trail around the town, and Bob reveals to the Machines that he is not planning a party.

programme.title: Bob the Builder
programme.desc: Bob has a day off and he takes a trip to Farmer Pickles farm to take some photographs for the town photography competition. Wendy, meanwhile, has been called to the school hall where a pipe has burst, threatening the competition.
